title: tragacantha secunda
intro: Tragacantha secunda, also known as Astragalus gummifer, is a plant species in the legume family native to the Mediterranean region, specifically known for its thorny stems and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Tragacantha secunda include its potential to boost the body's defenses against infections and diseases, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory function. Tragacantha secunda can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in the production of traditional medicine products such as tinctures and capsules.
